CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Closed") || ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Canceled"), Billing_Submit_Verify_Stage_Met_Stamp__c, IF(RecordType.Name = 'Billing', IF(NOT(ISBLANK( Billing_Submit_Verify_Stage_Met_Stamp__c )), Billing_Submit_Verify_Stage_Met_Stamp__c , DATEVALUE( Account__r.School_Object__r.Billing_Submit_Verify_Stage_Met_Date__c ) ), NULL ) )
CustomField.label: Billing Submit Verify Stage Met Date
